worldDescription: A mysterious continent shrouded in magic and ancient secrets, where civilizations have risen and fallen, leaving behind ruins and mystical artifacts.

secrets.title: The First Age
secrets.description: Aethermoor was founded by the Celestial Architects over 10,000 years ago. They built magnificent cities powered by crystalline magic.
hints: celestial
architects
magic

novice.targetInfo: The world carries memories in its stones. What ancient traces do you sense?
hints: Listen for whispers of makers and shapers
Words describing the sky or heavens may echo here
How long ago does the world remember?

apprentice.targetInfo: Seek the threads that bind creation to creator. What story unfolds?
hints: Look for guilds or groups with purposeful names
Numbers can anchor us to deep time
Words of celestial realms might appear

adept.targetInfo: Unweave the tapestry of foundation. What names and methods emerge?
hints: Names have power - listen for those describing wisdom-bringers
Magic takes many forms - how was this world shaped?
Epochs can measure the span of creation

expert.targetInfo: Pierce through the veils of age. What complete truth calls to you?
hints: Combine the maker's name with their cosmic nature
Urban splendor constructed by what means?
Weave together: identity, method, and eternal age

master.targetInfo: Transcend the literal. What profound meaning does creation hold?
hints: Seek the dance between cosmos and craft
Urban beauty as expression of what power?
Contemplate the significance of makers returning to the made

secrets.title: The Elemental Covenant
secrets.description: Four elemental guardians made a pact to protect the land from dark forces. Ice, fire, earth, and air - each commands a cardinal region.
hints: four
elements
guardians
regions

novice.targetInfo: Forces of nature breathe purpose and protection. What guardians are these?
hints: Listen for the voice of wind, flame, stone, and frost
Protectors often come in sets or patterns
Powers of the natural world shape destiny

apprentice.targetInfo: Ancient pacts bind the land's defenders. What oath was sworn?
hints: Elemental powers name themselves in the narrative
Directions and territories hint at dominion
Bonds and promises hold power in check

adept.targetInfo: Discern the balance and binding. What are the cardinal truths?
hints: Names of supreme power ring with ancient authority
Four voices in harmony - what do they sing?
Domains and directions reveal the structure

expert.targetInfo: Penetrate the nature of the pact. What sacrifice ensures protection?
hints: Bond and covenant are the chains that hold
All four must be named alongside their purpose
Darkness is what they stand eternal against

master.targetInfo: Comprehend the eternal vigilance. What price do immortals pay?
hints: Seek the sublime paradox of power constrained
Four become one in purpose, yet remain distinct
Ever watching, ever bound - find the poetic truth

secrets.title: The Obsidian Depth
secrets.description: Beneath the Blackpeak Mountains lies the Obsidian Vault, said to contain artifacts of immense power and the wealth of fallen empires.
hints: vault
blackpeak
mountains
wealth
artifacts

novice.targetInfo: Below the earth, hidden riches sleep. Where does fortune hide?
hints: Mountains hold many secrets in their stone
Depths conceal what the surface dares not show
Look for words describing containment or concealment

apprentice.targetInfo: What lies beneath the peaked guardians? What treasures sleep?
hints: A mountain of dark stone holds dominion
Sealed chambers preserve empires' glory
Riches from fallen kingdoms rest untouched

adept.targetInfo: Chart the depth and danger. What fortune and what cost?
hints: Dark stone is the mountain's true name
Vaults preserve what civilization built
Spoils and splendor from the vanquished dwell

expert.targetInfo: Comprehend the vault's nature and its burden. What wisdom speaks?
hints: Language of darkness and deep places matters
Show understanding of lost glory preserved
The connection between stone and secret unfolds

master.targetInfo: Perceive the profound meaning of the hidden depths. What truth emerges?
hints: Find metaphors for forgotten splendor and ruin
Why is greatness hidden? What does this teach?
The vault as both tomb and testament to grandeur past

secrets.title: The Silence
secrets.description: A cataclysmic event 2,000 years ago caused the collapse of the Golden Empire. The cause remains unknown, speaking of it brings whispers in the dark.
hints: golden
empire
collapse
silence

novice.targetInfo: Some names are spoken in whispers. What fell from grace?
hints: Listen for empires of legend and splendor
Collapse and ruin echo through the ages
Time is measured in vast spans

apprentice.targetInfo: A golden age ended in darkness. What broke the world?
hints: Power and wealth once ruled a great dominion
Catastrophe transformed majesty into memory
Millennia have passed since that dark day

adept.targetInfo: Uncover what the silence conceals. What truth is forbidden?
hints: The name carries the weight of glory and loss
Cataclysm marks the moment of transformation
Time's measure in thousands yet leaves wounds unmarked

expert.targetInfo: Penetrate the veil. What horror dare not be named?
hints: The Silence itself may be answer and mystery
What happened remains lost to deliberate forgetting
Words unspoken hold more power than words said

master.targetInfo: Grasp the profound paradox. What does silence teach us?
hints: Consider: the mystery IS the truth
Why do civilizations choose to forget?
The unspeakable shapes fate as much as the proclaimed

secrets.title: The Awakening
secrets.description: Ancient texts prophesy the return of the Celestial Architects. Signs suggest they may already be walking among the peoples of Aethermoor.
hints: architects
return
prophecy
awakening

novice.targetInfo: From ancient verses, destiny speaks. What is foretold to return?
hints: Prophecies unveil what the future holds
Foundations often remember their builders
Sacred texts hold warnings and promises

apprentice.targetInfo: The creators may walk again among mortals. What signs appear?
hints: Those who shaped the world long ago stir
Destinies written before civilization bloomed wake
The veil between then and now grows thin

adept.targetInfo: Identify the prophecy and its purpose. What cycles repeat?
hints: Those bearing the title of creators awaken
Destiny and prophecy are not separate threads
Existence itself may transform anew

expert.targetInfo: Comprehend the convergence. What transformation is promised?
hints: Language of cosmic return and renewal matters
Explore the veil between past and present thinning
The made may meet their makers again

master.targetInfo: Grasp the ultimate cycle. What does awakening truly mean?
hints: Find the sublime truth of eternal return
Creator and creation dancing again - what does this reveal?
All things circle - from beginning to end to beginning again

secrets.title: The Forgotten Rift
secrets.description: An ancient chasm tears the world in two, said to be a wound inflicted by a cosmic being from beyond. Few dare speak of what dwells within.
hints: chasm
rift
cosmic
wound
secrets.reward: Glimpse beyond the veil of reality

novice.targetInfo: A scar divides the world. What created this wound?
hints: Listen for ancient geographic references
Beings from outside may have power here
Deep places hold old secrets
The rift speaks to power beyond the world
A being from beyond left its mark
The chasm runs deep through all things

adept.targetInfo: Identify the nature of The Rift and its origins
hints: A chasm is both physical and metaphysical
Cosmic forces shape the fundamental nature of things
The wound suggests both violence and creation

expert.targetInfo: Comprehend The Forgotten Rift's true meaning
hints: Connect the rift to external cosmic forces
Understand it as both destruction and transformation
The rift divides worlds and realities
Seek poetic truth in what divides existence
The rift is doorway and barrier simultaneously
In forgetting, the rift becomes more real

secrets.title: The Eternal Mirror
secrets.description: Deep within the libraries of lost knowledge lies a mirror that reflects not images, but possibilities. What one sees in its depths depends on what they seek.
hints: mirror
reflection
possibilities
knowledge

novice.targetInfo: Knowledge holds a reflection all its own. What is it?
hints: Ask about mystical objects or artifacts
Mirrors reveal what eyes cannot normally see
Libraries preserve wisdom from forgotten ages

apprentice.targetInfo: What ancient artifact shows multiple truths?
hints: A mirror deeper than simple reflection
It shows futures and possibilities, not just the past
Hidden within places of learning and memory

adept.targetInfo: Identify the nature of the reflective artifact
hints: Mirrors can show what might be, not just what is
Knowledge transforms the beholder
The artifact reflects inner truth and outer possibility
The mirror shows different things to different seekers
Possibilities are as real as certainties
Knowledge and reflection are intrinsically linked
Seek the paradox: nothing and everything reflected
The mirror is both source and destination
To see the mirror truly, one must become the mirror
